description:
Implement `hx-color-picker` (T3 tier) — 2/6 libraries ship this. Color selection control with swatches, gradient picker, and hex/rgb/hsl input.

**Files to create** in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-color-picker/`:
- `index.ts`, `hx-color-picker.ts`, `hx-color-picker.styles.ts`, `hx-color-picker.stories.ts`, `hx-color-picker.test.ts`

**Props:** `value` (string — CSS color), `format` (`hex`|`rgb`|`hsl`|`hsv`), `opacity` (boolean — show alpha channel), `swatches` (string[] — preset colors), `disabled` (boolean), `name` (string — form field), `inline` (boolean — show picker inline vs in popover)

**Slots:** `trigger` (custom trigger element, default is a color swatch button)

**Events:** `hx-input` (while dragging), `hx-change` (on commit)

**CSS Parts:** `trigger`, `swatches`, `grid`, `slider`, `hue-slider`, `opacity-slider`, `input`

**ARIA:** `role="dialog"` on the picker panel (when popover mode). Hue/saturation/alpha sliders use `role="slider"` with `aria-valuenow`/`aria-valuemin`/`aria-valuemax`. Text inputs for hex/rgb values.

**ElementInternals:** Form participant. Use `setFormValue` with current color value.

**Quality gates:** type-check zero errors, all tests (value parsing, format conversion, swatches, form submission), axe-core zero violations, Storybook all formats + swatches + inline, bundle < 8KB (complex UI exception).

Register in `packages/hx-library/src/index.ts` and `packages/hx-library/vite.config.ts`.
title: IMPLEMENT: hx-color-picker — T3 Color Picker Input
